creator: shrikanth07@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 222402
Attached panic screenshot from ESXi console to FreeBSD VM.

I have a screenshot of the panic which I am attaching to this bug report. The environment is FreeBSD Head VM running on ESXi server with vmxnet interface configured.
To recreate the panic
#ifconfig vmx0 media autoselect
vmx0: device enable command failed!
and then shortly there is a panic seen.

Refer the attached screenshot.
